name: GitHub Issue → Runner Agent Intake

parameters.command: cat /opt/dev-fabric/evidence/github-agent-runs/{{ $('Prepare RUN_INPUT.json').first().json.owner }}/{{ $('Prepare RUN_INPUT.json').first().json.repo }}/issue-{{ $('Prepare RUN_INPUT.json').first().json.issue_number }}/{{ $('Prepare RUN_INPUT.json').first().json.run_id }}/status.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{"status":"UNKNOWN","error":"status.json not found"}'

description: GitHub Issue → Runner Agent Intake Workflow. Manual Trigger Fallback (kein GitHub Trigger bis Credential konfiguriert). Liest Issue-Kontext, erzeugt RUN_INPUT.json, startet Runner, liest Evidence, formatiert Issue-Kommentar.
